description.en: Can you hit the bullseye in one shot — clear goals, constraints, and expected outcomes.
description.zh: 你能不能一句话就命中靶心 — 目标明确、约束清晰、期望具体。

adjustmentGuide.upward: keyMessages show terse but surgically precise instructions (filePath + identifier + action in < 100 chars) — this is 'silent expert' precision, not low intent.
adjustmentGuide.downward: keyMessages show verbose messages that still lack clear deliverables — length without clarity.

description.en: Do you set the stage for AI — tech stack, project structure, business context.
description.zh: 你给 AI 画的蓝图够不够清楚 — 技术栈、项目背景、业务上下文。

adjustmentGuide.upward: First messages consistently provide project structure + tech stack even without triggering keyword matches (e.g. pasting file trees, config snippets).
adjustmentGuide.downward: Opening messages are long but generic — length without project-specific information.

description.en: Can you defuse complex tasks into AI-friendly steps — progressive building, reasonable scope.
description.zh: 你能不能把大任务拆成 AI 能搞定的小步骤 — 渐进构建、合理拆分。

granularity.baselineFormula: 50 - clamp(patterns.demandOverloads / max(stats.humanMessages, 1), 0, 0.3) * 150 - clamp(patterns.longUnstructured / max(stats.humanMessages, 1), 0, 0.2) * 150 + (labelRatios.progressive - 0.1) * 80 + (labelRatios.checkpoint - 0.05) * 80 - clamp((stats.avgHumanMsgChars - 300) / 500, 0, 1) * 25, clamped [0, 100]

adjustmentGuide.upward: sessionFlows show the user naturally breaks work into phases even without explicit 'step by step' language.
adjustmentGuide.downward: Even short messages pack multiple unrelated requests — demand overload in compact form.

description.en: When AI goes off-track, can you steer it back — explain why, pinpoint issues, show examples.
description.zh: AI 跑偏时你能不能精准拉回来 — 说清原因、定位问题、给出正例。

adjustmentGuide.upward: sampleExchanges show the user gives precise corrections with code snippets even without reasoning keywords (shows, doesn't tell).
adjustmentGuide.downward: Corrections are specific but never explain why — AI can't learn from the feedback.

description.en: Do you proof-check AI output — ask for tests, review the approach, and validate assumptions.
description.zh: 你能不能鉴别 AI 输出的好坏 — 要求测试、审查代码、验证思路。

adjustmentGuide.upward: User runs their own tests outside the conversation (evidence: pastes test results back), or reviews AI diffs in IDE before accepting — invisible verification.
adjustmentGuide.downward: High proactiveReview ratio but always accepts anyway after AI answers — performative checking.

description.en: Do you control the conversation tempo — milestones, summaries, topic focus.
description.zh: 你掌控对话节奏的能力 — 设里程碑、控话题、做总结。

adjustmentGuide.upward: sessionFlows show clean arcs (setup → build → verify → close) even without explicit 'summary' or 'milestone' keywords.
adjustmentGuide.downward: User writes recaps but sessions still sprawl — summaries without actual convergence.

scoring.adjustmentRequirement: Must cite specific keyMessages or sampleExchanges evidence in reasoning. No adjustment without evidence.

confidenceScaling.low: All baseline scores shrink 30% toward 50 (score = 50 + (baseline - 50) * 0.7). Warn user.

scoring.overallGradeNote: For users who primarily do short tasks (bug fixes, quick features), Architecture may score low naturally. Mention this in insight if architecture is the clear outlier and session count is high.

description.en: You and AI are perfectly in sync — your communication creates seamless flow.
description.zh: 你和 AI 已经完美同步，沟通高效且精准。

description.en: You've built strong AI collaboration instincts — smooth and efficient most of the time.
description.zh: 你有很好的 AI 协作直觉，大部分时候配合流畅。

description.en: You're finding your rhythm — clear room to grow with specific improvements.
description.zh: 你正在找到属于自己的协作风格，进步空间明确。

description.en: Your style is freestyle and intuitive — a bit of structure would go a long way.
description.zh: 你的风格偏自由随性，加一些结构会让效果翻倍。

description.en: Everyone starts here — small changes lead to big improvements.
description.zh: 每个人都从这里开始，小小的改变就能带来大的提升。

leftDescription.en: Thinks out loud — messages expose reasoning chains, multiple causal connectors, exploratory structure.
leftDescription.zh: 边想边说 — 消息展露推理过程，多因果连接，结构发散。

rightDescription.en: Thinks internally — messages are terse directives with file paths and identifiers, conclusions only.
rightDescription.zh: 精炼直接 — 消息是带文件路径和标识符的短指令，只说结论。

leftDescription.en: Grounds requests in concrete references — file paths, line numbers, variable names, code snippets.
leftDescription.zh: 用具体引用锚定需求 — 文件路径、行号、变量名、代码片段。

rightDescription.en: Focuses on patterns and architecture — design discussions, system-level thinking, abstract concepts.
rightDescription.zh: 关注模式和架构 — 设计讨论、系统级思考、抽象概念。

leftDescription.en: Optimizes for correctness — corrections cite performance, edge cases, type safety, efficiency.
leftDescription.zh: 优化正确性 — 纠正时引用性能、边界情况、类型安全、效率。

rightDescription.en: Optimizes for experience — corrections cite readability, UX, naming, aesthetics.
rightDescription.zh: 优化体验 — 纠正时引用可读性、用户体验、命名、美感。

tf.behavioralSignals: correctingTCount vs correctingFCount (primary) + global T/F keyword ratio (secondary)

leftDescription.en: Sessions follow planned arcs — setup, implement, test, close. High topic coherence between messages.
leftDescription.zh: Session 呈现计划弧线 — 设置、实现、测试、收尾。消息间话题连贯性高。

rightDescription.en: Sessions are exploratory — frequent direction changes, tries multiple approaches, adapts on the fly.
rightDescription.zh: Session 呈探索式 — 频繁改变方向、尝试多种方案、随机应变。

description.en: Design first, code later. Precise instructions but sometimes misses sharing the "why" behind decisions.
description.zh: 先设计后编码，指令精准，善于系统性思考。偶尔可以多分享决策理由，让 AI 参与思考。

description.en: Curiosity-driven, loves exploring multiple approaches. Could benefit from converging faster once a direction is clear.
description.zh: 好奇心驱动，喜欢探索多种方案。可以适当收敛，确定方向后集中推进。

description.en: Efficient AI commander with clear steps. Strong execution but may rush past validation checkpoints.
description.zh: 高效指挥 AI，步骤清晰，执行力强。注意在关键节点暂停验证。

description.en: Loves discussing trade-offs, active conversations. Watch for topic drift in longer sessions.
description.zh: 喜欢讨论方案优劣，思维活跃。可以在发散后及时收敛，避免对话过长。

description.en: Focused on product vision and user experience. Provides rich context but could be more specific on technical details.
description.zh: 关注产品愿景和用户体验，给 AI 充足上下文。在技术细节上可以更具体。

description.en: Pursues code aesthetics and readability. Requirements sometimes expressed too abstractly.
description.zh: 追求代码美感和可读性，注重质量。需求表达有时可以更具体。

description.en: Great at guiding AI with positive and negative examples. High-quality feedback loop.
description.zh: 善于引导 AI，提供正反例，反馈质量高。很棒的协作风格。

description.en: Rich ideas and active sessions. Watch for scope creep and topic drift.
description.zh: 想法丰富且发散，session 内容充实。注意聚焦，避免话题漂移。

description.en: Strict step-by-step execution, thorough verification. Could try more open-ended exploration.
description.zh: 严格按步骤推进，验证严谨。可以偶尔尝试更开放的探索方式。

description.en: Values stability and test coverage. Conservative but reliable AI usage.
description.zh: 注重稳定性和测试覆盖，AI 使用保守但可靠。可以尝试让 AI 承担更多创造性工作。

description.en: Clear goals, efficiency-first. Instructions read like task tickets. Add context for better results.
description.zh: 目标明确，效率优先，给 AI 的指令像任务单。适当加入一些背景说明效果更好。

description.en: Focuses on team collaboration and documentation. Great at generating maintainable code.
description.zh: 注重团队协作和文档，善于让 AI 生成可维护代码。

description.en: Few words, precise prompts. Strong debugging instincts.
description.zh: 少说多做，prompt 极简但精准，调试能力强。

description.en: Cares about code aesthetics and detail. Iterative polisher.
description.zh: 关注代码美学和细节，逐步打磨作品。

description.en: Fast iteration, build-as-you-go. Could benefit from upfront planning to reduce rework.
description.zh: 快速迭代，边做边改，行动力强。可以增加前期规划减少返工。

description.en: Loves immediate visual results. Drawn to UI/frontend work, full of energy.
description.zh: 喜欢看到立即的视觉效果，偏好 UI 工作，充满热情。
